name: POLICY-BACKLOG-9
title: philosophy.md Bounded Scope should reference contract.md schema format
description: philosophy.md section 2 'Bounded Scope' says 'Cross-scope communication is contract-bound. Read nothing outside the contract. Generate nothing outside the contract.' But it does not point to HOW a contract is encoded. The repo has docs/spec/contract.md per feature with a JSON 'provides/reads/invokes/never' schema. Either philosophy.md should link to contract.md (deriving a concrete contract format) or spec-rules.md section 2 should explicitly call out the docs/spec/contract.md location as canonical. Without this, subagents see the abstract principle but cannot find the artifact. Location: .claude/features/policy/philosophy.md section 2 (lines 25-32).
